Birla Institute of Technology Mesra Entr.verdict_note: phodu.club page confirms exact JEE Main closing ranks (CSE General 2024 = 22317, Mechanical 2024 = 90773); BIT Mesra admits via JEE Main not its own entrance exam, so ranks are real but the channel (JEE Main, third-party portal) should be labelled.

DAIICT Entrance Test.verdict_note: getmyuni confirms the sampled values (VLSI 2023 92/144, M&C 2023 23/35, ICT-CS 2024 11000/16000), but rank scales are mixed across years (2023 ranks 23-144 vs 2024 ranks 11000-16000) implying GUJCET/merit ranks vs JEE Main AIR conflated; admission is JEE Main+GUJCET not a 'DAIICT Entrance Test'.

Defence Institute of Advanced Technology.verdict_note: getmyuni confirms GATE M.Tech closing scores (Data Science 546, Comm&Signal 401, Auto&Robotics 462, Materials 192); DIAT admits via GATE not its own exam, and scores are correctly placed in the score column tagged '(GATE)'.

Gujarat Common Entrance Test – Polytechn.verdict_note: Read the cited PDF directly: it is the official ACPDC Gujarat Diploma Engineering 2023-24 institutewise-branchwise cutoff; verified DR.S.& S.S.GANDHI College Mechanical Engg OPEN = Merit Rank 16440 / Merit Marks 191 matching the sample; rank in rank column, marks in score column, both correct.

Indian Institute of Petroleum and Energy.verdict_note: iipe.ac.in shows Applied Geology values (CRL 136, EWS 235) but these are M.Sc admission-list ranks (IIT JAM-based) wrongly labelled as the B.Tech entrance and year '2026', and First/Third admission lists are conflated; careers360 B.Tech rows are JEE Main/JoSAA ranks; values real but channel/level/year misclassified.

Indian Institute of Science Bachelor of.verdict_note: Official IISc BS-program cutoff PDF confirms the sampled figures (IAT General ~43 2025, IAT ST 69 2024, JEE-Advanced SC 20558 2023) across IAT/JEE-Adv/JEE-Main/NEET/KVPY channels which are correctly named in the Branch column; ranks in the rank column, units correct.
